steps.title: Use the requested input
steps.content: The variable $x$ is years after the 2000 census, so 2 years after the census means $x=2$.

steps.title: Read the graph
steps.content: At $x=2$, the graph is a little above $4$ on the $y$-axis, about $4.3$. Since $y$ is measured in thousands, this means about $4.3$ thousand people.

steps.title: Convert to people
steps.content: $4.3$ thousand people is $4.3\times1{,}000=4{,}300$ people. That matches Choice C — 4,300.
